# Sarabjeet Rattan
> B2B AI & Strategic Operations Portfolio. Expert in scaling AI strategy, industrial hemp consultancy, and operational excellence.

## Core Content
- [Home](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/): Primary showcase of B2B AI solutions, portfolio highlights, and strategic operations.
- [Resume](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/resume): Comprehensive professional history, core competencies, and educational background.

## Portfolio Highlights
- [Case Studies](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/#case-studies): Detailed analysis of past B2B AI implementations and strategic success stories.
- [Projects](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/#projects): Technical and strategic projects demonstrating expertise in AI and operations.
- [Services](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/#services): Specialized consultancy services including AI strategy and industrial hemp operations.

- [FAQ](https://sarabjeetrattan.com/#faq): Frequently asked questions regarding B2B AI strategy and process optimization.
